creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vinícius Zavam from comment #85)

a bit more from the stable/12 machine:

% ntpq -4 -n -c rl localhost
associd=0 status=c018 leap_alarm, sync_unspec, 1 event, no_sys_peer,
version="ntpd 4.2.8p12-a (1)", processor="amd64",
system="FreeBSD/12.1-STABLE", leap=11, stratum=16, precision=-22,
rootdelay=0.000, rootdisp=1.020, refid=STEP, reftime=(no time),
clock=e1ab0f74.8d96c57d  Mon, Dec 23 2019 10:03:32.553, peer=0, tc=6,
mintc=3, offset=0.000000, frequency=500.000, sys_jitter=0.000238,
clk_jitter=0.000, clk_wander=0.000, tai=37, leapsec=201701010000,
expire=202006280000
